landing.subtitle: Join the platform that bridges the gap between citizens and their elected representatives using advanced Artificial Intelligence.
landing.trustTitle: Trusted by Government Bodies · Built with Enterprise AI
landing.problemSubtitle: India's governance gap — the space between a citizen's problem and official action — costs billions in lost productivity and public trust every year.
beforePoints: Citizens call helplines — get put on hold for hours
Complaints submitted in English only — excluding 80% of rural India
No tracking — issues disappear into bureaucracy
Duplicate reports flood the system, wasting official time
Officials have no data to prioritise what matters most
afterPoints: Voice reporting in 22 Indian languages — just speak
AI instantly categorises, deduplicates, and scores urgency
Real-time SMS/email updates at every step
Fraud detection blocks spam before it reaches officials
Geospatial dashboards show officials exactly where to act
landing.sectionHowItWorksSubtitle: Four steps from citizen complaint to government action.
landing.sectionFeaturesSubtitle: Six breakthrough AI capabilities built for India's governance challenges.
landing.sectionPreviewSubtitle: The command centre for modern district governance.
landing.sectionUseCasesSubtitle: A unified intelligence layer for every stakeholder in India's governance ecosystem.
landing.sectionTestimonialsSubtitle: Voices from officials who have deployed JanVikas AI.
landing.sectionCtaSubtitle: Join 145+ districts already transforming citizen governance with AI-powered transparency and accountability.
landing.sectionContactSubtitle: Have feedback, want a district deployment, or just curious? We'd love to hear from you.

steps.citizenInputDesc: Voice, text, or image submission in any of 22 languages from any device
steps.analysisDesc: Automatic categorisation, deduplication, sentiment scoring, and geo-tagging
steps.priorityDesc: Multi-factor algorithm ranks issues by urgency, equity, and impact
steps.actionDesc: Officials receive AI-briefed agenda and resolve issues with tracked accountability

cards.voiceDescription: Citizens report issues in their native tongue — spoken naturally. AI transcribes, translates, and categorises in real time.
cards.imageDescription: Attach photos of potholes, broken pipes, or garbage. Our vision model validates and geotags issues automatically.
cards.fraudDescription: ML models cross-reference submissions to detect duplicate, fake, or politically motivated complaints before they escalate.
cards.nlpDescription: Sentiment analysis, urgency scoring, and semantic clustering — transforming raw text into structured government intelligence.
cards.heatmapDescription: Geospatial intelligence surfaces infrastructure blackspots across the district. Identify the 20% of areas causing 80% of complaints.
cards.predictiveDescription: Forecasting models predict which issues will escalate in the next 30 days before they become a political crisis.

useCases.citizensPoint1: Submit issues in any Indian language

faqs.q1: What languages does JanVikas AI support?
faqs.a1: JanVikas AI supports all 22 officially recognised languages of India including Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Bengali, Gujarati, Marathi, and more. Citizens can speak, type, or record their issue in their native script.
faqs.q2: Is the data secure? Who can access citizen submissions?
faqs.a2: All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. Only verified government officials with role-based access can view submissions in their jurisdiction. Citizens can choose to remain anonymous. The platform is compliant with India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act.
faqs.q3: How does the AI prioritise issues?
faqs.a3: Our proprietary 6-factor algorithm scores issues based on: urgency, affected population size, equity index, geographic clustering, historical resolution time, and seasonal risk. Top-scored issues are surfaced first to the relevant official.
faqs.q4: Can it integrate with existing government systems (PFMS, e-Governance)?
faqs.a4: Yes. JanVikas AI exposes a RESTful API and webhook system that integrates with PFMS, state-level NIC portals, Aarogya Setu, and other DigiLocker infrastructure. Custom integrations are available for state deployments.
faqs.q5: How long does it take to deploy for a district?
faqs.a5: A standard district deployment takes 4–6 weeks including data onboarding, official training, and custom branding. Our team provides 24/7 support during the go-live period.

testimonials.oneQuote: JanVikas AI reduced our issue backlog by 60% in the first quarter. The AI prioritisation means we are solving the right problems first.
testimonials.twoQuote: The multilingual voice submission is a game-changer. Farmers in remote areas who could never before file a complaint are now being heard.
testimonials.threeQuote: The predictive analytics warned us about a water supply issue 3 weeks before it would have become a crisis. We fixed it in time.

about.title: About JanVikas AI
about.subtitle: Empowering citizens and enabling responsive governance through Artificial Intelligence.
about.missionBody: JanVikas AI was built to solve the fundamental disconnect between citizens and government officials. In a nation as vast and diverse as India, millions of civic issues go unheard due to language barriers, redundant reporting, and manual processing bottlenecks. We leverage GenAI to bridge this gap, ensuring every voice is heard, analyzed, and actioned.

cards.transparencyBody: Every interaction is securely logged, and citizens have full visibility into the lifecycle of their submissions.
cards.inclusivityBody: Language should never be a barrier to governance. Our 12+ language support ensures rural and urban citizens have equal access.
cards.innovationBody: Built using scalable, modern tech stacks to serve as a robust blueprint for state and national IT departments.
cards.actionBody: We don't just collect complaints; our AI provides prescriptive analytics for optimal budget allocation.

sections.informationBody: We collect information to provide better services to all our users. The types of data we collect include:
sections.accountInfoBody: Name, email address, phone number, and location details (district/state).
sections.submissionDataBody: Text, voice recordings, and images submitted as part of civic issues.
sections.usageDataBody: Information about how you interact with our Platform.
sections.useBody: The information we collect is used to:
sections.useItem1: Facilitate the reporting and tracking of civic issues.
sections.useItem2: Use AI/NLP models to translate, analyze, and deduplicate submissions.
sections.useItem3: Provide officials with aggregated, anonymized demographic and geographic insights.
sections.useItem4: Send you updates via SMS or email regarding your submissions.
sections.processingBody: Your voice and text submissions are processed by AI models to generate English/Hindi transcripts and summaries. We do not use personally identifiable information (PII) to train public AI models. Data is securely retained on cloud servers located in India, compliant with data protection regulations.
sections.sharingBody: We share your civic submissions (which may include your name and location) with the relevant government officials assigned to your jurisdiction. We do not sell your personal data to third-party marketers.
sections.rightsBody: You have the right to access, update, or request the deletion of your personal information. You can do so by contacting our support team or via your profile settings.

sections.acceptanceBody: By accessing and using the JanVikas AI platform ("the Platform"), you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use the Platform.
sections.serviceBody: JanVikas AI is a GovTech SaaS platform designed to facilitate civic engagement between citizens and government officials. The Platform uses AI to translate, deduplicate, and prioritize civic issues.
sections.conductItem1: You agree to provide accurate and truthful information when reporting civic issues.
sections.conductItem2: You agree not to submit false, malicious, or spam requests.
sections.conductItem3: You agree not to use the Platform for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
sections.conductItem4: The Platform relies on AI; while we strive for accuracy, automated translations and categorizations may occasionally err.
sections.privacyBody: Your use of the Platform is also governed by our Privacy Policy. By using the Platform, you consent to the collection and use of information as detailed therein.
sections.liabilityBody: JanVikas AI is a technological intermediary. We do not guarantee that any civic issue reported through the Platform will be resolved by the respective government authorities. We are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use the Platform.
